title: New Chinese Wedding Fashion Poster AI
sourceTitle: New Chinese Wedding Fashion Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Original premium oriental new-Chinese wedding fashion poster built around moon-white morning-gauze engagement dress, engagement ceremony, and slender adult East Asian woman with calm ceremonial elegance. Subject: slender adult East Asian woman with calm ceremonial elegance appears as an elegant adult East Asian wedding-fashion muse with restrained ceremonial presence, refined posture, and high-end bridal campaign temperament. Scene: White-but-not-empty xuan-paper atmosphere with pale mist, low-saturation ink wash, subtle oriental wedding symbols, and quiet luxury ceremonial space around engagement ceremony. Composition: half-side pose adjusting a translucent veil; Signature Elements: translucent veil and small ring box anchors the wedding moment while water-ink elements merge into veil, pibo, red silk, skirt hem, phoenix feathers, flower branches, gold traces, and background air layers. Style: Oriental ink fashion illustration blended with new-Chinese couture weddingwear, bridal campaign polish, xuan-paper texture, ink-wash negative space, translucent gauze, fine gold linework, and modern Eastern luxury aesthetics. Color Palette: Fixed refined wedding palette from moon-white morning-gauze engagement dress: moon white, jade white, pale gold, cinnabar, rice white, ink black, dark gold, deep indigo, pearl, and low-saturation ink haze as appropriate. Lighting: Soft ceremonial fashion light with translucent veil glow, gentle fabric highlights, gold-line shimmer, ink mist diffusion, and clean face and garment readability. Camera: Vertical 9:16 fashion-campaign framing with full or three-quarter garment visibility, elegant muse posture, enough negative space, and close detail clarity on embroidery and fabric layers. Materials: semi-transparent gauze layers, pearl embroidery, fine gold phoenix lines, and subtle ink-wash diffusion define the tactile couture craft: collar structure, shoulder and neck line, waist seal, sleeves, skirt, veil, pearls, gold thread, embroidery, ink diffusion, and fabric drape. Typography: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: New Chinese Wedding Fashion Poster Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Original premium oriental new-Chinese wedding fashion poster built around cinnabar red toast ceremony gown with rice-white silk and warm gold details, wedding toast ceremony, and elegant adult East Asian bridal muse with restrained confident gaze. Subject: elegant adult East Asian bridal muse with restrained confident gaze appears as an elegant adult East Asian wedding-fashion muse with restrained ceremonial presence, refined posture, and high-end bridal campaign temperament. Scene: White-but-not-empty xuan-paper atmosphere with pale mist, low-saturation ink wash, subtle oriental wedding symbols, and quiet luxury ceremonial space around wedding toast ceremony. Composition: soft over-shoulder pose lifting a small toast cup while showing the gown structure; Signature Elements: delicate toast cup, red silk ribbon, and faint flower-window shadow anchors the wedding moment while water-ink elements merge into veil, pibo, red silk, skirt hem, phoenix feathers, flower branches, gold traces, and background air layers. Style: Oriental ink fashion illustration blended with new-Chinese couture weddingwear, bridal campaign polish, xuan-paper texture, ink-wash negative space, translucent gauze, fine gold linework, and modern Eastern luxury aesthetics. Color Palette: Fixed refined wedding palette from cinnabar red toast ceremony gown with rice-white silk and warm gold details: moon white, jade white, pale gold, cinnabar, rice white, ink black, dark gold, deep indigo, pearl, and low-saturation ink haze as appropriate. Lighting: Soft ceremonial fashion light with translucent veil glow, gentle fabric highlights, gold-line shimmer, ink mist diffusion, and clean face and garment readability. Camera: Vertical 9:16 fashion-campaign framing with full or three-quarter garment visibility, elegant muse posture, enough negative space, and close detail clarity on embroidery and fabric layers. Materials: cinnabar silk, fine gold linework, pearl beadwork, translucent sleeves, ink-wash skirt diffusion, and embroidered floral branches define the tactile couture craft: collar structure, shoulder and neck line, waist seal, sleeves, skirt, veil, pearls, gold thread, embroidery, ink diffusion, and fabric drape. Typography: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

imagePrompts.title: New Chinese Wedding Fashion Poster Variant 02

prompt: Theme: Original premium oriental new-Chinese wedding fashion poster built around moon-white morning-gauze engagement dress, engagement ceremony, and slender adult East Asian woman with calm ceremonial elegance. Subject: slender adult East Asian woman with calm ceremonial elegance appears as an elegant adult East Asian wedding-fashion muse with restrained ceremonial presence, refined posture, and high-end bridal campaign temperament. Scene: White-but-not-empty xuan-paper atmosphere with pale mist, low-saturation ink wash, subtle oriental wedding symbols, and quiet luxury ceremonial space around engagement ceremony. Composition: half-side pose adjusting a translucent veil; Signature Elements: translucent veil and small ring box anchors the wedding moment while water-ink elements merge into veil, pibo, red silk, skirt hem, phoenix feathers, flower branches, gold traces, and background air layers. Style: Oriental ink fashion illustration blended with new-Chinese couture weddingwear, bridal campaign polish, xuan-paper texture, ink-wash negative space, translucent gauze, fine gold linework, and modern Eastern luxury aesthetics. Color Palette: Fixed refined wedding palette from moon-white morning-gauze engagement dress: moon white, jade white, pale gold, cinnabar, rice white, ink black, dark gold, deep indigo, pearl, and low-saturation ink haze as appropriate. Lighting: Soft ceremonial fashion light with translucent veil glow, gentle fabric highlights, gold-line shimmer, ink mist diffusion, and clean face and garment readability. Camera: Vertical 9:16 fashion-campaign framing with full or three-quarter garment visibility, elegant muse posture, enough negative space, and close detail clarity on embroidery and fabric layers. Materials: semi-transparent gauze layers, pearl embroidery, fine gold phoenix lines, and subtle ink-wash diffusion define the tactile couture craft: collar structure, shoulder and neck line, waist seal, sleeves, skirt, veil, pearls, gold thread, embroidery, ink diffusion, and fabric drape. Typography: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.
